  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#f7f5eb" />

    <radialGradient id="greenGrad" cx="40%" cy="40%">

  <g stroke="#5a3f2a" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.9" fill="none">

  </g>

  <!-- sliced kiwi (foreground left) -->
  <g transform="translate(120,320)">
    <!-- outer rind -->
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="120" ry="70" fill="#7b5a37" stroke="#5a3f2a" stroke-width="6" />
    <!-- inner green flesh -->
    <ellipse cx="-6" cy="2" rx="86" ry="50" fill="url(#greenGrad)" />
    <!-- white core -->
    <circle cx="-6" cy="2" r="14" fill="#eefae6" />
    <!-- seeds arranged radially -->
    <ellipse cx="36" cy="2" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(90 36 2)" />
    <ellipse cx="30.4" cy="23" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(120 30.4 23)" />
    <ellipse cx="15" cy="38.4" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(150 15 38.4)" />
    <ellipse cx="-6" cy="44" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(180 -6 44)" />
    <ellipse cx="-27" cy="38.4" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(210 -27 38.4)" />
    <ellipse cx="-42.4" cy="23" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(240 -42.4 23)" />
    <ellipse cx="-48" cy="2" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(270 -48 2)" />
    <ellipse cx="-42.4" cy="-19" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(300 -42.4 -19)" />
    <ellipse cx="-27" cy="-34.4" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(330 -27 -34.4)" />
    <ellipse cx="-6" cy="-40" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(0 -6 -40)" />
    <ellipse cx="15" cy="-34.4" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(30 15 -34.4)" />
    <ellipse cx="30.4" cy="-19" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(60 30.4 -19)" />
  </g>

  <!-- kiwi bird (right) -->
  <g transform="translate(360,320)">
    <!-- body -->
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="95" ry="55" fill="#6b4530" stroke="#543422" stroke-width="4" />
    <!-- head -->
    <circle cx="-70" cy="-18" r="26" fill="#6b4530" stroke="#543422" stroke-width="4" />
    <!-- beak (long, pointing left) -->
    <polygon points="-44,-20 -170,-28 -170,-6 -44,-2" fill="#5a3f2a" />
    <!-- small eye -->
    <circle cx="-76" cy="-22" r="4" fill="#0b0b0b" />
    <!-- legs -->
    <line x1="10" y1="30" x2="10" y2="68" stroke="#543422" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <line x1="34" y1="30" x2="34" y2="74" stroke="#543422" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <!-- feet -->
    <line x1="10" y1="68" x2="0" y2="76" stroke="#543422" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <line x1="10" y1="68" x2="20" y2="76" stroke="#543422" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <line x1="34" y1="74" x2="24" y2="82" stroke="#543422" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <line x1="34" y1="74" x2="44" y2="82" stroke="#543422" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <!-- subtle belly highlight -->
    <ellipse cx="10" cy="6" rx="48" ry="28" fill="#7c523b" opacity="0.25" />
  </g>
</svg>
